name: Notification
description: A notification component for displaying temporary messages with various types, custom icons, auto-dismiss functionality, and close button support.
usage_guidelines: Use for non-intrusive feedback messages and system notifications.
Choose appropriate type (success, info, warning, danger) for message severity.
Set duration for auto-dismiss behavior (0 for persistent notifications).
Use title for notification heading and children for detailed message.

closable.description: Shows close button for manual dismissal.

customIcon.description: Custom icon to replace default status icon.

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds. Set to 0 for persistent.

onClose.description: Callback fired when notification is closed.

titleClass.description: CSS classes for the title element.

styling_info.visual_description: A rectangular card with rounded corners, status icon, title, message content, and optional close button. Positioned typically at screen corners. Includes smooth fade-out animation on dismiss.

Do: Use appropriate type for message severity
Dont: Don't use for critical errors requiring action (use Dialog instead)
Don't set very short durations users can't read
Don't use for permanent information (use Alert instead)
